nasb.text: The total of the numbered men of the camp of Dan was 157,600. They shall set out last by their standards.”

esv.text: All those listed of the camp of Dan were 157,600. They shall set out last, standard by standard.”

cnv.text: 凡是屬但營被數點的，共有十五萬七千六百人；他們要隨著自己的旗號，最後起行。”

ccb.text: 但营区共有十五万七千六百人，他们是后队。
